text_excerpt: News | Gareth Davies MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Gareth News My local priorities Help & Advice News Gareth joins Lincolnshire MPs to meet Minister for Dentistry on Lincoln Dental School Campaign - 28/04/26 Tuesday, 28 April, 2026 Pleased to join fellow Lincolnshire MPs this morning to meet with the Health Minister responsible for dentistry, Stephen Kinnock MP, as we continue to support the campaign led by the University of Lincoln for a Lincoln Dental School.
